heading: Research and dissemination to increase the participation of women and underrepresented minorities in STEM fields
label: 19017 Research and dissemination to increase the participation of women and underrepresented minorities in STEM fields

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Director shall make awards on a competitive, merit-reviewed basis, to institutions of higher education or non-profit organizations (or consortia of such institutions or organizations), to enable such entities to increase the participation of women and underrepresented minorities in STEM studies and careers.
Research to analyze the record-level data collected under sections 19152 and 19154 of this title, consistent with policies to ensure the privacy of individuals identifiable by such data.
Research to study best practices for work-life accommodation.
Research to study the impact of policies and practices that are implemented or are otherwise consistent with the purposes of this section.
Mentoring programs that facilitate engagement of STEM professionals with students.
Research experiences for undergraduate and graduate students in STEM fields.
Outreach to elementary school and secondary school students to provide opportunities to increase their exposure to STEM fields.

collaboration with other Federal research agencies and professional associations to exchange best practices, harmonize work-life accommodation policies and practices, and overcoming common barriers to work-life accommodation; and
collaboration with institutions of higher education in order to clarify and catalyze the adoption of a coherent and consistent set of work-life accommodation policies and practices.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026, and 2027.
